cards.title: Green tax
cards.text: A flat government environmental fee charged per person, per night — typically higher for resorts than guesthouses. It's mandatory and separate from the room rate.

cards.title: Service charge
cards.text: Usually around 10%, added by the resort or guesthouse itself. Not always negotiable, and rarely optional despite the name.

cards.title: GST / tourism tax
cards.text: A government tax on tourism goods and services, typically in the mid-teens percentage-wise, applied on top of the room rate.

cards.title: Meal plan
cards.text: Ranges from room-only to full all-inclusive. This is often the single biggest cost swing in your total — see the comparison below.
